title: Voidwalker Origins
description: Voidwalker origins made for OriginsSMP by LevyTrotsky
body:
this mod adds some origins done by me.

depends on mob origins, extra origins, and origins

so far added

### VoidWalker:

has elytra and can launch into air\
gains regen when dropped below 5 hearts (later on after 60 seconds of regen you get slowness and weakness)
(not yet implemented) Spawn in the end\
you have extra hearts\
you take 2x fire damage\
you have more hunger\
spawns at end city

### Panda:

gain haste when full hunger \
(later date for now is with the haste buff) use 4 hunger to get strength 2 for 30sec\
you need to eat double a normal origin\
(tbd)

### Dragonborn:

dragon breath recharges every minute and 40 second lasting\
slow falling and elytra for easy movement\
spawns in end city\
dragonscales more armor protection making you stronger\
strong arms you can break stone with your bare fist you can also break things faster with the strong arms

### Drowned:

like merling\
throws trident

### Turtle:

natural armor gives stronger armor like shulks\
water breathing you can breath underwater\
water vision you can see better underwater\
aqua affinity more water breathing\
swim speed makes you swim faster in water\
like water you have creative flight in water \
aquatic without water you can die\
conduit power on land conduit works for you on land
